items.title: Save up to $6,822 on EcoFlow’s DELTA Pro Ultra and Ultra X power stations + bundles at some of their best prices from $3,853
items.summary:
As part of EcoFlow’s ongoing Members Festival x Earth Day Mega Sale, the brand is offering some notable low prices on its largest power stations. To start, there’s EcoFlow’s DELTA Pro Ultra Portable Power Station that is dropping down to $3,853.06 shipped at checkout, beating its Amazon pricing by $246. This is the brand’s second-largest expanding power solution, which is down from its $6,098 full price to $4,099, but you’ll also be getting an extra $246 savings taken from the tag at checkout. We’ve only seen this price beaten out by the brand’s direct Black Friday sale and some past exclusive deals that dropped costs to the $3,799 low, making this deal here the next-best price with $2,245 total savings. Likewise, the larger DELTA Pro Ultra X Power Station is getting a similar extra savings deal to $7,499 shipped at checkout, which is the best non-exclusive deal we have ever tracked from EcoFlow on this newer and more expansive solution. Head below to learn more about these two models and browse the additional bundle deals getting extra savings at checkout, too.

more…
